title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE DOГғВ‘A CARMEN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ“ TAGBINA ANNEX IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF TAGBINA, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR FROM THE DOГғВ‘A CARMEN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS TAGBINA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 4, 397 (January 28, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10259, November 15, 2012 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE DOГғВ‘A CARMEN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ“ TAGBINA ANNEX IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF TAGBINA, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR FROM THE DOГғВ‘A CARMEN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS TAGBINA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into an Independent National High School.

ГўВҖВ“ The DoГұa Carmen National High School ГўВҖВ“ Tagbina Annex in Barangay Poblacion, Municipality of Tagbina, Province of Surigao del Sur is hereby separated from the DoГұa Carmen National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Tagbina National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВҖВ“ All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the DoГұa Carmen National High School ГўВҖВ“ Tagbina Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Tagbina National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

ГўВҖВ“ The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the DepartmentГўВҖВҷs program the operationalization of the Tagbina National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current yearГўВҖВҷs appropriation of the DoГұa Carmen National High School ГўВҖВ“ Tagbina Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВҖВ“ The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВҖВ“ This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 22, 2011 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 15 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
